info.title: FileNetBrowser Widget API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the FileNetBrowser widget — a folder and document browser for IBM FileNet Content Engine via GraphQL, used in IBM Business Automation Workflow coach views.

FileNetBrowserOptions.description: Configuration options for the FileNetBrowser widget, set via getOption() in BAW Coach View designer.

graphqlEndpoint.description: Full URL of the FileNet Content Engine GraphQL API endpoint.

repositoryIdentifier.description: FileNet repository identifier (e.g., 'OS1'). This identifies which object store to use.

rootFolderPath.description: FileNet folder path to start browsing from. Defaults to root '/'.

showDocumentDetails.description: Show document version and metadata details in the list.

allowMultiSelect.description: Allow multiple items to be selected at once.

showBreadcrumb.description: Show breadcrumb navigation at the top.

pageSize.description: Number of documents to display per page. Set to 0 to disable pagination.

showPagination.description: Show pagination controls when there are more documents than pageSize.

FolderInfo.description: Information about a FileNet folder returned by the folder query.

id.description: FileNet object ID of the folder.

className.description: FileNet class name of the folder.

pathName.description: Full path of the folder in FileNet.

DocumentInfo.description: Information about a FileNet document returned by the document query.

id.description: FileNet object ID of the document.

className.description: FileNet class name of the document.

majorVersionNumber.description: Major version number of the document.

minorVersionNumber.description: Minor version number of the document.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the document content.

contentSize.description: Size of the document content in bytes.

SelectionInfo.description: Information about selected item(s) passed to event handlers.

id.description: FileNet object ID of the selected item.

pathName.description: Full path of the selected item (folders only).

GraphQLFolderQuery.description: GraphQL query used to retrieve folder information.

query.example: query GetFolder($repoId: String!, $path: String!) { folder(repositoryIdentifier: $repoId identifier: $path) { className id name pathName } }

GraphQLDocumentQuery.description: GraphQL query used to retrieve document information.

query.example: query GetDocument($repoId: String!, $docId: String!) { document(repositoryIdentifier: $repoId identifier: $docId) { className id name majorVersionNumber minorVersionNumber } }

FileNetBrowserWidget.description: Complete FileNetBrowser widget configuration and data contract.

pathName.description: The new folder path after navigation.
